title: Sky ages
description: A "evil" dev (me) trapped you on a island of dirt, now you cannot escape (I think)
body:
*This project is in pre-alpha game breaking update and many bugs can happen*


### Story :

You're trapped on a dirt island by an "evil" dev (me) and you cannot escape (I think)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Type of mod :

This modpack is a progression based skyblock with many usefull tool and mechanism along the way to full automation and future tech. If you like progession based mod it's made for you. A wiki will be created soon.
## 
## This is the starting island : 

![starting point](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64c01669fa0d6b4b25dd556ca347ec16d2beb46d.jpeg)

### Need help :

If you're stuck use JEI, REI or EMI and if this doesn't work try asking in comment. I will try to respond as soon as possible. I will create a modpack later to use FTB quest and other mods to help in the progression, but for now you are alone.



You goal (not achievable now) is to get out of the void to rejoin the overworld and escape the "evil" dev. 

### 
### Future updates : 

For now there's only the beggining of the first stage of the game called "Root" (this can help for early game) but many are to come. This mean that this mod will be huge soon with lots of advancement and items. If you don't want to have this mod enable every time I will had this option soon.

Planning for next updates :

-Finishing stage root + fixing multiplayer

-Adding more stages for progression

-Adding more advancement and items to the stages

-Fix more bugs and add QOL

This is not fixed and it may change with time



Good luck and don't play this mod with many others this could result in bug or crash because of the new dimension.
